overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy riding a black horse through a stormy prairie landscape. The rider travels along dirt trails through open grasslands, passes wild horses, navigates a path junction, and descends into a rocky canyon while light rain falls under dark overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with prominent rock butte

events.description: a second rider on a brown horse approaches from ahead and rides alongside briefly before moving ahead
large layered rock butte becomes prominent on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: riding a black horse at a steady canter along the dirt trail through tall grass

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse approaches from the distance and rides alongside the ego character briefly

entered.detail: massive layered rock formation with flat top rising prominently from the prairie grassland
worn dirt path cutting through tall green grass
dark heavy storm clouds covering the sky with visible rain streaks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a lone rider traveling through an open prairie under stormy skies. A second rider briefly joins and rides alongside before moving ahead. The camera follows the main character as a massive rock butte emerges on the left, dominating the landscape while the trail continues through the windswept grassland.

events.description: small herd of wild horses appears grazing on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: maintaining a steady gallop along the trail while passing through open grassland

notable_agents.action: herd of wild horses grazing peacefully in the tall grass near the trail

entered.detail: group of horses grazing in the tall prairie grass
gentle green hills extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The rider continues through the open prairie as the rock butte passes behind. Wild horses appear grazing on the left side of the trail. The landscape consists of rolling green hills under the stormy sky, with the dirt trail winding through the tall grass.

events.description: approaching a fork in the trail marked by a wooden signpost
encountering another rider crossing from left to right at the path junction

agents.ego_description: approaching the trail junction and continuing straight through the fork

notable_agents.action: rider on dark horse crossing the path from left to right at the junction

entered.detail: weathered wooden trail marker indicating the path fork
steep rocky terrain with sparse vegetation rising on the right
dirt path splitting into two directions

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes more rugged as the rider approaches a trail junction marked by a wooden signpost. Another rider crosses the path from left to right at the fork. Rocky hills rise on both sides as the prairie gives way to more arid, stony terrain.

events.description: trail descends into a narrow rocky canyon with steep walls closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: riding downward through the winding canyon path with rocky walls towering on both sides

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff faces forming a narrow passage on the left
rocky slope rising steeply on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail descends into a narrow canyon with steep rocky walls closing in on both sides. The open prairie is replaced by an enclosed passage of stone and sparse vegetation. The rider continues downward through the winding canyon path as the terrain becomes increasingly rugged and confined.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open, stormy prairie that gradually narrows into a confined rocky canyon. It begins with a lone rider traveling through windswept grasslands under overcast skies, briefly accompanied by another rider before a massive rock butte emerges to dominate the horizon. As the butte recedes, the camera tracks the rider past wild horses grazing among rolling green hills, following a winding dirt trail through the tall grass. The scene then shifts as the terrain becomes more rugged, passing a wooden signpost at a trail junction where another rider crosses the path while stony hills begin to rise on both sides. Finally, the open landscape gives way entirely to a narrow canyon, with the camera descending through a winding passage of steep rocky walls and sparse vegetation.
